product.name: 1080P HD Wireless Wall Outlet Charger Security Camera with 45W Fast Charging Station USB-C & USB-A, Home Security Camera for Baby and Pet WiFi Enabled
features: 1. 45W Fast Charging Power Hub Built with 45W high-output fast charging, this wall outlet charger supports USB-C PD and dual USB-A ports, allowing you to power phones, tablets, and other devices simultaneously with stable and efficient performance
2. 1080P Full HD Video & Wide-Angle View Delivers clear 1080P video with a wide-angle field of view, ideal for monitoring rooms, entryways, or personal spaces.

3. Integrated Home Security Camera： Features a built-in camera for indoor safety monitoring, helping you keep an eye on important areas when you are away. Designed for home security and property protection
4. Easy Wall Outlet Installation： Simply plugs directly into a standard wall outlet—no wiring, no batteries required. Compact design keeps your space neat while adding functionality
5. Reliable Design for Everyday Use： Combines charging, power management, and home security into one compact device. Suitable for daily household use and modern smart homes
